name: Corn Pone Pie from Loren Martin
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, sausage or Turkey
1 Can (17 oz) Whole kernel Corn, drained
1 Can (14.5 oz) Mexican Stewed tomatoes, drained
1 Can black olives, chopped and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat and onion in a large skillet, stirring until the meat crumbles. Drain well.
2. Stir in corn, beans, stewed tomatoes, olives, and pepper; cook over medium heat until ingredients are thoroughly heated.
3. Pour mixture into an 11 X 7 X 1 1/2 inch baking dish. Set aside.
4. Mix cornbread according to package directions; pour over meat mixture.
5. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
